data.title: Former Australian executive allegedly sold cyber secrets to Russia for crypto, earning around $1.26 million.
data.description: According to U.S. prosecutors, a former executive of a defense contractor received approximately $1.26 million in cryptocurrency in exchange for sharing sensitive exploit tools connected to intelligence operations of the Five Eyes alliance.

data.title: Candel Therapeutics prices public offering of 18.3M shares at $5.45/share, expects to raise $100M, with option for 2.7M more shares.
data.description: Candel Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CADL), a biopharmaceutical company based in Needham, Massachusetts, specializing in developing immunotherapies for cancer treatment, disclosed the pricing details of its recent public offering. The Company priced 18,348,624 shares of its common stock at $5.45 per share, with the gross proceeds anticipated to reach $100 million, excluding underwriting discounts and other expenses. The offering, expected to close by February 23, 2026, grants underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to 2,752,293 additional shares at the public offering price. This move aligns with Candel's commitment to advancing cancer treatment research and underscores its financial strategies for growth and development.

data.title: Zhejiang Satellite TV’s Yue Opera Spring Festival Gala aired, coinciding with the 120th anniversary of Yue Opera’s birth.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on the second day of the Chinese New Year, the 120th anniversary of Yue Opera’s inception was celebrated with the "Yue Rhyme Chinese New Year—2026 Yue Opera Spring Festival Gala," which was broadcast as planned. The gala featured top Chinese opera masters, talented singers, and fans of Yue Opera worldwide. This event offered a blend of classical traditions, fusion of genres, and innovative technological presentations, highlighting the diverse talents within the art form. The gala aimed to showcase the rich cultural heritage of Yue Opera to a global audience.

data.title: New Tesla Cybertruck prices: base model - $59,990, high-end model - $99,990. Aimed to boost sales but may not improve profit margins.
data.description: The starting price for a newly released Tesla Cybertruck with fewer features is $59,990, while the premium Cyberbeast model is priced at $99,990. This pricing strategy is aimed at revitalizing sluggish sales; however, it is unlikely to improve profit margins significantly. The Tesla Cybertruck's starting price was recently announced at $59,990.
Moody’s Ratings has assigned a Baa3 rating to Vertiv’s proposed senior unsecured debt, maintaining a stable outlook for the company’s credit profile.

data.title: Celebrating Chinese New Year in Guangdong with top food picks; festivities in full swing in Year of the Horse.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on February 19, 2026, the Lunar New Year celebrations for the Year of the Horse are vibrant. The festive ambiance is particularly prevalent in Guangdong, where the culinary traditions take center stage during this time. Food plays a crucial role in welcoming the New Year in the region, reflecting the cultural significance attached to the annual festivities.

data.title: Ecopetrol S.A. calls for General Shareholders' Meeting on March 27, 2026, 9am at Centro Internacional de Negocios.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on February 19, 2026, the CEO of Ecopetrol S.A. has called for a General Shareholders' Meeting on March 27, 2026, beginning at 9:00 a.m. The meeting will take place at Centro Internacional de Negocios.

data.title: Ecopetrol S.A. appoints Ángela María Robledo Gómez and Hildebrando Vélez Galeano as chairwoman and director.
data.description: Colombian oil company Ecopetrol S.A. announced that its board of directors recently elected Ángela María Robledo Gómez as the chairwoman. The decision was made during the session held on February 18 and 19, 2026. The company, listed on the Bogota Stock Exchange (BVC: ECOPETROL) and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: EC), also appointed Hildebrando Vélez Galeano to a key position.

data.title: Ecopetrol reports 1,944 billion barrels oil equiv. in reserves, replacing 121% of production; highest in 4 years.
data.description: Colombia's Ecopetrol Group achieved a significant milestone by recording proven reserves of 300 million barrels of oil equivalent (mmboe), the highest figure in the past four years. This increase was supported by a reserves replacement ratio of 121%, attributed to the successful implementation of recovery projects. The group's average reserve life has now reached 7.8 years. This announcement was made in Bogotá, Colombia, on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Ecopetrol shares measures for shareholders at AGM on March 27, 2026.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on February 19, 2026, leading company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) disclosed its adherence to regulations outlined in the Legal Basic Circular from the Financial Superintendence of Colombia (C.E. 006). This measure is aimed at ensuring compliance with Part III, Title I, Chapter VI of the circular.

data.title: Binance Junior offers Merchant Pay and Red Packet gifting to users aged 6-17, with $12K annual cap on transfers.
data.description: Binance Junior introduces new features for users aged 6-17, including Merchant Pay, Red Packet gifting, and crypto education. The platform sets a $12,000 annual limit on transfers by non-parental accounts.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich named Texas Monthly Super Doctor for 21st year in a row. Recognized in Dallas with consecutive honors.
data.description: Renowned plastic surgeon Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, based in Dallas, has received the prestigious recognition of being named a Texas Monthly Super Doctor for the 21st consecutive year. This achievement highlights his outstanding reputation among peers in the medical community. Dr. Rohrich's dedication to his profession has earned him this honor, showcasing his expertise and leadership in the field of plastic surgery. The continued acknowledgment by Texas Monthly underscores his consistent excellence in patient care and surgical outcomes. This news was revealed on February 19, 2026, emphasizing Dr. Rohrich's ongoing commitment to providing exceptional healthcare services.
